Name: Label
Description: A display label for the PhysicalStructureScheme.

Name: PhysicalStructureSchemeReference
Description: Reference to an existing PhysicalStructureScheme for inclusion.

Name: PhysicalStructureReference
Description: A PhysicalStructure description providing the primary link to the LogicalRecord and general structural information. Each description can apply to one or more data files containing the same logical records in the same overall structure.

Name: PhysicalStructureGroupReference
Description: A group of PhysicalStructure descriptions for administrative or conceptual purposes.
